name: Twitch Chat
description: Twitch IRC chat reader using central main-tool platform auth/settings, with automatic token refresh, reconnect handling, metrics, emotes, and viewer join desktop alerts.
description_de: Liest und schreibt den Twitch-Chat mit zentraler Anmeldung, automatischer Token-Erneuerung, Live-Werten, Emotes und Zuschauer-Warnungen.
description_en: Reads and writes Twitch chat with central authentication, automatic token refresh, live metrics, emotes and viewer alerts.
